title: Farmer's Assortment
description: Farmer's Assortment is a new addon for Farmer's Delight that seeks to add variants of some existing core blocks and items as well as some new ones!
body:
![Upcoming Update + Forager's Insight Compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f48500948a9eb3144508034460ec338660ebdfe.png)

**Farmer's Assortment** is a new addon for **[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)** that seeks to add variants of some of its core blocks and items.

Players can craft these variants along with new blocks and items unique to Farmer's Assortment!
